query:
SELECT 'categories' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM categories
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products', COUNT(*) FROM products
UNION ALL
SELECT 'supplier_products', COUNT(*) FROM supplier_products
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_visible', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE isVisible = true
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_with_stock', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE stockQuantity > 0 OR stockUnlimited = true;
